seed_instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions.
org_constraint: The keyword "art" must appear at least five times.
new_constraint: Avoid using the keyword "art" in the email.
instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions. The keyword "art" must appear at least five times. Avoid using the keyword "art" in the email.
response:
Subject: Inquiry about Upcoming Visual Displays

Dear [Gallery Name] Team,

I hope this email finds you well.

I am a great admirer of the creative works showcased at your gallery, and I am very interested in learning more about your future programming. I am particularly keen to see what new visual presentations you have planned.

Could you please provide me with information regarding any upcoming exhibitions? I am fascinated by contemporary expression and am eager to explore the diverse range of creative pieces you feature.

If you have a digital calendar or a list detailing the forthcoming displays, I would be very grateful if you could share it. I am always looking to immerse myself in high-quality visual culture.

Thank you for your time and assistance. I look forward to hearing about the next collection of beautiful creations.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Contact Information]<turn|>
